poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group whose queue depth changed.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

previousDepth.description: Previous queue depth before the change.

currentDepth.description: Current queue depth for the pool.

depthDelta.description: Change in queue depth (currentDepth - previousDepth). Positive indicates added jobs, negative indicates jobs were processed.

highThreshold.description: High threshold used to determine alerting for queue depth pressure.

lowThreshold.description: Low threshold used to determine recovery or low-water alerting.

thresholdState.description: Queue depth state relative to configured thresholds after this change.

alertRecommended.description: Indicates whether this queue depth update should trigger alerting workflows.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this queue depth event, such as source of queue measurement, confidence level, or additional metrics.
